text:
(In reply to Robert Nagy from comment #1)
After 
# sysctl kern.maxtsiz=268435456
kern.maxtsiz: 134217728 -> 268435456

> ungoogled-chromium 
Illegal instruction

I'm giving up at this point, because I'm a friend of lightweigt and minimalism. 
Ungoogled-chromium does not meet my needs. Maybe it makes others lucky.
